name: Sauerbraten No.3
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Onions, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a deep bowl.
2. Pour over it the vinegar and water.
3. Add onions, lemon, cloves, bay leaves, peppercorns, salt, and sugar.
4. Cover and place in refrigerator for a minimum of two days, no longer than four. The longer it soaks, the stronger the taste. Turn meat at least once a day.
5. When ready to cook, remove meat from liquid and dust lightly with flour using up to 1/4 cup. Use a spatula to turn the meat if necessary.
6. Heat oil in a large pot or Dutch oven.
7. Brown meat on all sides.
8. Strain marinade, removing and discarding solids, keeping only clear liquid.
9. Add 1 cup of strained marinade liquid to the meat in the pan, reserving the remainder.
10. Cover tightly and cook slowly over low heat for about 3 hours, until meat is fork tender. Add more marinade if necessary to keep at least 1/2 inch of liquid in the pan.
11. When meat is done, remove from the pan.
12. Crush the gingersnaps and combine with the remaining 6 tablespoons flour.
13. Blend with 2 cups of reserved marinade liquid, then stir into the liquid in the pan and bring to a boil.
14. Cook, stirring until thickened.
15. Serve hot with meat. Meat is also good cold, sliced. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
